expected_codes.display: Chronic migraine without aura, not intractable, without status migrainosus

expected_facts.notes: Primary neurologic diagnosis with chronic subtype.
Prophylactic therapy continued at current titration.

expected_facts.verbatim_span: Continue sumatriptan PRN for acute migraine
expected_facts.notes: Abortive therapy continued. RxNorm code for sumatriptan not included in corpus seed; extractor should still identify the medication by name.
Monthly headache frequency as patient-reported observation.

expected_non_facts.verbatim_span:
unremarkable, no demyelinating
lesions, no mass, no chronic small vessel disease
expected_non_facts.should_not_produce: Condition: Demyelinating disease / mass / small vessel disease
expected_non_facts.rationale: Prior MRI findings explicitly negated. Imaging history, not a current condition.

expected_non_facts.verbatim_span:
Discussed CGRP monoclonal antibody options (e.g., erenumab)
     as a future step
expected_non_facts.rationale: Discussed as future option only; not prescribed at this visit.
